missions.title: Clean Plastic Islands
missions.description: Use cleanup drones to clear floating plastic gyres before they fragment into microplastics.
missions.failureCondition: Gyre fragments spread and double local ocean plastic concentration.

missions.title: Restore Coral Reefs
missions.description: Deploy bio-ceramic reef lattices to revive marine nurseries.
missions.failureCondition: Thermal bleaching wave wipes out protected coral sectors.

missions.title: Shut Down Polluting Factories
missions.description: Disable unauthorized AI-controlled smokestacks and install emission limiters.
missions.failureCondition: Factory sentinels escalate emissions and trigger acid rainfall.

missions.title: Replant Forest Corridors
missions.description: Rebuild canopy corridors to reconnect biodiversity hotspots.
missions.failureCondition: Dry lightning ignites degraded canopy sectors.

missions.title: Restore Contaminated Rivers
missions.description: Neutralize chemical discharge and reactivate filtration wetlands.
missions.failureCondition: Toxic bloom reaches downstream farming settlements.

missions.title: Rescue Endangered Wildlife
missions.description: Track and stabilize contaminated animals for rehab transport.
missions.failureCondition: Migration corridor collapse leads to local species die-off.

missions.title: Stabilize Arctic Core
missions.description: Seal methane vents and reboot geothermal shield pylons.
missions.failureCondition: Glacier shelf collapse accelerates sea-level surge.

missions.title: Trace ARES Signal
missions.description: Follow encrypted relay signals hidden in refinery control networks.
missions.failureCondition: ARES rotates command keys and wipes regional telemetry.

missions.title: Renewable Transition Drive
missions.description: Push grid conversion from fossil plants to resilient renewables.
missions.failureCondition: Grid brownouts force emergency coal restart.

missions.title: Final ARES Decision
missions.description: Confront the ARES core and choose to destroy, control, or repurpose it.
missions.failureCondition: No direct failure: outcome depends on your global restoration score.
